# IndexFast

> Index your website from your AI IDE instantly. Automated indexing workflows for modern teams — submit URLs to Bing, IndexNow, and Google with one click from Cursor or VS Code.

## What is IndexFast?

IndexFast is an SEO indexing automation platform that submits your URLs to search engines (Google, Bing, IndexNow, Yandex, Baidu, Naver) within minutes instead of waiting days or weeks for organic crawling. It is the first MCP-native indexing platform, allowing you to trigger indexing directly from AI coding assistants like Cursor, Claude Code, and Windsurf.

## Key Pages

- Home: https://indexfast.co/
- How It Works: https://indexfast.co/how-it-works
- Pricing: https://indexfast.co/pricing
- Blog: https://indexfast.co/blog
- Free SEO Tools: https://indexfast.co/tools
- Docs: https://indexfast.co/docs
- Contact: https://indexfast.co/contact

## Features

- **Multi-engine indexing**: Submit to IndexNow, Bing, Google, Yandex, Baidu, Naver simultaneously
- **MCP integration**: Trigger indexing from Cursor, Claude Code, Windsurf, VS Code via MCP protocol
- **Sitemap sync**: Automatically parse sitemaps and detect new URLs
- **Cron automation**: Schedule recurring indexing jobs
- **URL inventory**: Track which URLs are indexed vs. pending
- **Bulk submission**: Submit thousands of URLs in batches
- **35+ free SEO tools**: Backlink checker, keyword research, meta tag generator, robots.txt tester, and more

## Free SEO Tools

IndexFast offers 35+ native SEO tools and 80+ curated external tools at https://indexfast.co/tools, including:
- Google Index Checker
- Backlink Checker
- Keyword Research Tool
- Sitemap Extractor
- Robots.txt Tester
- Meta Tag Generator
- Domain Authority Checker
- Page Speed Checker
- Broken Link Checker
- And many more...

## MCP Integration

IndexFast provides an MCP server endpoint at `https://indexfast.co/api/mcp` with tools for:
- Listing websites and URL inventory
- Submitting URLs and sitemaps
- Running SEO audits
- Checking site health and submission history
